channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Executives Blame Internal Chaos for Enterprise AI Gaps
item.description: For large businesses, artificial intelligence promises to serve as a path to increased productivity and bigger profits. But C-suites are often pushing for transformational AI implementation without agreeing on who owns the process or what success looks like. … [Intel]

item.title: From the Gobi Desert to Canada’s North: This Chinese visionary is betting on AI to power this country’s future
item.description: In China, the energy landscape has reached a historic tipping point. For the first time, its total installed wind and solar capacity has officially surpassed that of coal. It’s a shift driven by massive industrial scale and artificial intelligence — and Chine… [Intel]

item.title: Prometheus bound: Why xAI cofounder and former OpenAI hand Kyle Kosic is heading to Jeff Bezos’ AI venture
item.description: Jeff Bezos’ AI venture Project Prometheus has hired Kyle Kosic, a former OpenAI engineer and xAI cofounder, to strengthen its infrastructure team, the Financial Times reported. The move highlights intense competition for AI talent, as Prometheus expands rapid… [OpenAI]

item.title: U.S. Military Operation in Iran Costs Up to $500 Million Daily, Research Shows
item.description: U.S. Military Operation in Iran Costs Up to $500 Million Daily, Research Shows The ongoing U.S. military campaign against Iran, designated Operation Epic Fury, has cost the United States between $22.3 billion and $31 billion over its first five weeks, accordi…

item.title: SK Hynix shares jump 15% after peer Samsung projects blowout earnings
item.description: SEOUL, April 8 : Shares of South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix surged on Wednesday after peer Samsung Electronics forecast market-beating quarterly earnings, fuelling expectations about SK Hynix's results.Samsung Electronics on Tuesday projected its first-quarter… [Samsung]

item.title: Narwhal Labs raises €22.9M and launches DeepBlue OS, an autonomous AI communication platform for regulated industries
item.description: The Bristol-based company, parent of Narwhal AI, is building an operating system for autonomous customer conversations across voice, SMS, email, and WhatsApp. CEO Luke Sartain has previously led the Narwhal Media Group. Narwhal Labs, a Bristol-based AI infras… [SAP, Meta]

item.title: Anthropic launches Project Glasswing to test advanced AI for cybersecurity
item.description: Anthropic has launched Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity initiative that brings together major tech firms to test a powerful, unreleased AI model capable of identifying and addressing software vulnerabilities at scale, amid rising concerns over AI-driven cyb… [Anthropic]

item.title: AI for the People
item.description:
Rep. Ro Khanna
A manifesto for an AI revolution that works for the many, not just the billionaires.
The post AI for the People appeared first on The Nation.

item.title: Asian tech stocks surge as U.S.-Iran cease fire ease Hormuz disruption worries
item.description: Shares of Asian tech and semiconductor comoanies surged on the news that the U.S. and Iran agreed to a conditional two-week ceasefire.
